# novu_environment (Resource)

Environment resource. Manage any environment within the organization. 
WARNING : this resource could not be properly tested ! 
In the free and Pro plans, only the color can be updated, everything else throws an error. 
If you are in one of these plans, Prefer using the data source instead.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The environment name

### Optional

- `color` (String) The environment color. The default color is #3498db. This value can not be read from the API, so changes in the interface will be ignored.
- `identifier` (String) The environment identifier. Can be updated (on the Team and Enterprise plans) but not set at creation.
- `parent_environment_id` (String) The environment's parent id. Not sure if it requires replace. Tested not editable on the free and Pro plans.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The environment id
- `is_production` (Boolean) Whether it is the production environment
- `slug` (String) The environment's slug
